title: Syed Fahad
text: Home * People * Syed Fahad Syed Fahad , a computer chess programmer from Indian-administrated region of Kashmir , who began chess programming at age 13 [1] . He is author of chess engines Chesser [2] and Yaka [3] . Fascinated by bit-twiddling along with bitboards and in particular sliding piece attacks , he devised the subtraction based attack mask generation ( SBAMG ), and wrote the bitboard C++ library dubbed M42 [4] which offers magic bitboards , hyperbola quintessence , and SBAMG [5] . Further, Syed Fahad rediscovered the idea of table-driven move generation as implemented experimentally inside Yaka which turned out to be slower than magic bitboards [6] .
